name: knowledge-brain
description: 个人第二大脑：智能消化入库、索引管理、预加载问答、知识同步。基于飞书 Wiki 构建的个人知识管理系统。

plugins.name: knowledge-brain
plugins.description: A personal second brain system with intelligent content digestion, index management, knowledge sync, and Lark Wiki integration. Features include /digest for content ingestion, /sync for knowledge synchronization, and /knowledge-init for setup.
